summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PagesEditor WYSIWYG integration for institutional pages in CMS Admin. All features working correctly including TipTap-based rich text editor, 3 tabs (Contenuto/Impostazioni/SEO), page grouping by Profilo/Legal, create/edit/save functionality, and public page rendering.

design_issues.issue: TipTap console warning about duplicate extension names (link, underline) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with credentials admin@azriscossione.it / AzAdmin2024!
Backend: GET /api/cms/pages returns all 8 pages
Backend: POST /api/cms/pages creates new page
Backend: PUT /api/cms/pages/{slug} updates page content with rich HTML
Backend: DELETE /api/cms/pages/{slug} deletes custom pages
Backend: GET /api/public/pages/{slug} returns published page
Backend: Duplicate slug correctly rejected with 400
Backend: Unauthenticated CMS access denied with 401
Frontend: Pagine tab accessible in CMS Admin navigation
Frontend: PagesEditor component loads with sidebar
Frontend: 8 pages displayed grouped by Profilo (6) and Legal (2)
Frontend: Page selection works (Chi Siamo, AZ Ricerca e Sviluppo, etc.)
Frontend: Modifica button enables edit mode
Frontend: TipTap WYSIWYG editor appears with full toolbar
Frontend: Toolbar has H1-H4, Bold, Italic, Underline, Strikethrough buttons
Frontend: Toolbar has alignment buttons (left, center, right, justify)
Frontend: Toolbar has list buttons (bullet, numbered)
Frontend: Toolbar has image, link, spacing, undo/redo buttons
Frontend: Save/Cancel buttons visible in edit mode
Frontend: Impostazioni tab shows publish toggle and page info
Frontend: SEO tab shows Meta Title, Meta Description, Google preview
Frontend: Nuova Pagina dialog opens with title and slug inputs
Frontend: Content editing and saving works end-to-end
Frontend: Content persists after save
Frontend: Returns to view mode after save
Public: /profilo/chi-siamo renders page with rich content
Public: Breadcrumbs and sidebar navigation work
Public: Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy pages accessible
critical_code_review_comments: TipTap editor has duplicate extension warning - consider deduplicating link/underline extensions in RichTextEditor.js
PagesEditor.js line 71: useEffect missing dependency array warning (fetchPages) - add to deps or use useCallback
context_for_next_testing_agent: PagesEditor WYSIWYG integration fully tested. All 8 institutional pages (chi-siamo, az-ricerca-sviluppo, az-per-il-sociale, az-per-la-qualita, az-formazione, lavora-con-noi, privacy-policy, cookie-policy) are editable via TipTap editor. The editor supports H1-H4 headings, bold/italic/underline, lists, blockquotes, images, links, and spacing. SEO fields (meta title, meta description) work with Google preview. Public pages render HTML content correctly with rich-content CSS class.
